when.expression: #[(upper(attributes.method default '') as String) == 'OPTIONS' and ((attributes.requestPath default '') startsWith '/api/proxy')]

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/evaluation') --- 'http://localhost:8084' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL Evaluation

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/academic') --- 'http://localhost:8093' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL Academic

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-user') --- 'http://localhost:8081' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL User

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-course') --- 'http://localhost:8082' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL Course

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-enrollment') --- 'http://localhost:8083' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL Enrollment

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-financial') --- 'http://localhost:8086' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL Financial

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-email') --- 'http://localhost:8085' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL Email

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-esb-cert') --- 'http://localhost:8092' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL ESB certificado

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/java var rp = attributes.requestPath default '' var rest = substringAfter(rp, '/api/proxy/svc-esb-purchase') --- 'http://localhost:8091' ++ (if (isEmpty(rest)) '/' else rest)]
set-variable.doc:name: URL ESB compra

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: true, message: 'Prefijo /api/proxy no reconocido', path: attributes.requestPath }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error

http:request.doc:name: Llamada upstream
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- ({"Authorization": (attributes.headers["Authorization"] default attributes.headers["authorization"]) default ("Bearer " ++ "CHANGE_ME")}) ++ (if ((upper(attributes.method default "GET") as String) != "GET") {"Content-Type": (attributes.headers["Content-Type"] default attributes.headers["content-type"]) default "application/json"} else {})]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: true, bff: true, errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), description: error.description default '', causeMessage: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error
